A prominent elevation rising above the surrounding level of the Earth's surface.
An expanded paved area at the end of a street used by vehicles for turning around. The placement of addressed structures located along the street may wrap around the end of the cul-de-sac.
A circular intersection allowing for continuous movement of traffic at the meeting of roadways, when the circle is represented as a point.
A movable barrier across a road.
A structure or barrier where a fee is collected for using a road.
